title: CviRI Assay Conditions
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2eihq","text":"For use in CviRI Purification From XZ-6E Virus Infected NC64A Chlorella.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":11,"length":60}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"01BB70B7AF7D4B03BA4D9D2FE609E78D","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/CviRI-Purification-From-XZ-6E-Virus-Infected-NC64A-er4bd8w"}}}}
steps: All assays are carried out in 20.0 µL volumes with 1 µg of pUC19 DNA as substrate for 60 to 120 min at 25°C. 02:00:00
The assays are electrophoresed on 1.2% agarose gels (100 mL gels with double 20 lane combs) for 1 hour at 100 volts in 1X TPE buffer. 01:00:00
Gels are stained with 0.5 µg/mL ethidium bromide for 30 min and visualized and photographed on a UV light box. 00:30:00
creator: Irina Agarkova
